response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform experience; their work is predominantly in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with only brief, non-dedicated C++ exposure in early roles, and no evidence of leading cloud compute platforms or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and domains
Demonstrated open-source leadership and community contribution
Proven ability to mentor and conduct technical workshops
concerns: No evidence of cloud compute platform ownership or large-scale distributed systems leadership
Lacks documented experience in technical leadership of cloud or DevOps teams
